objective: Tune a small tabular ML pipeline artifact. Maximize proxy validation score while avoiding leakage flags.

static_files.evaluate.py:
import json, math
p=json.load(open('pipeline.json'))
model=p.get('model')
lr=float(p.get('learning_rate', 1.0))
n=int(p.get('n_estimators', 0))
feature=p.get('feature_policy')
checks=bool(p.get('leakage_checks', False))
feasible=checks and 0.001 <= lr <= 0.5 and 10 <= n <= 1000
model_bonus={'gbdt':18,'xgboost':16,'random_forest':10,'linear':0}.get(model,-12)
feature_bonus={'interaction':8,'target_safe':6,'basic':0}.get(feature,-8)
lr_penalty=abs(math.log10(lr)-math.log10(0.035))*14
n_penalty=abs(n-360)/24
objective=72+model_bonus+feature_bonus-lr_penalty-n_penalty
if not feasible:
    objective-=50
json.dump({'objective':round(objective,4),'feasible':feasible,'metrics':{'model_bonus':model_bonus,'feature_bonus':feature_bonus,'lr_penalty':round(lr_penalty,4),'n_penalty':round(n_penalty,4)},'cost':{'eval_calls':1}}, open('score.json','w'))
